title: Pet Munchies Venison Strips Dog Treats, Premium Wheat Free Dog Chews with Natural Real Meat, Low in Fat and High in Protein 75g
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL VENISON: This gourmet treat is made with 100% natural, human-grade, venison fused with beef liver - delicately roasted to perfection in their own natural juices

HEALTHY & JUNK-FREE: Our healthy venison strips contain no artificial colours or flavours, are naturally high in protein, wheat and gluten free and low in fat & salt making them the perfect treat to feed your four legged friends
PERFECT FOR TRAINING: These succulent strips of venison can be given as a chew, and are easy to break up for delicious training and reward treats for walks and recall

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our venison strips are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet

SEALED WITH A DOG'S APPROVAL: Pet Munchies is a UK based company dedicated to creating premium, gourmet treats that are made with high quality, human grade meat. Our treats are delicious, nutritious and wholesome, with all the meaty flavours dogs love delicately toasted to perfection!
description: Product Description Premium natural gourmet tasty treats are made from finest ingredients. Low in fat & high in protein. Free from wheat, cereals & gluten. Indications All breeds and sizes, Puppies over 4 months, Training, Weight control Ingredients Venison, Beef Liver, Vegetable Protein, Glycerin, Starch, Salt. Directions As stated on packaging Box Contains 75g pouches Manufacturer Contact Information Pet Munchies Ltd, P.O. Box 1075, St Albans, Herts, AL1 9RJ, UK. See more
